title: Grouped-Query Attention
description: An attention variant that reduces KV cache memory by sharing key-value heads across query heads.
problemStatement: KV caches grow with context length and head count.
coreIdea: GQA lets several query heads share fewer key-value heads.

whatItIs.title: What It Is
whatItIs.body: Grouped-query attention is an attention variant derived from multi-head attention.
